name: Polaris Inc.
description: Polaris Inc. is a leading American manufacturer of powersports vehicles, headquartered in Medina, Minnesota. Founded in 1954, the company has established itself as a global innovator in the powersports industry, producing a diverse range of products including all-terrain vehicles (ATVs), side-by-side off-road vehicles, snowmobiles, and motorcycles. Polaris is dedicated to helping people discover the joy of being outdoors through its commitment to engineering excellence, performance, and rider-focused design. With a strong presence in both consumer and commercial markets, the company continues to shape the future of off-road exploration and utility transportation worldwide.
